old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-3rfh","title":"[cross-impl] TrickleTimer reset/start behavior differs across Rust/C/Python","description":"Rust treats Stopped state specially in reset() and starts the timer (see test reset_from_stopped_starts_timer and try_reset logic using state==Stopped). C and Python only check interval != imin (no-op after init since interval=imin). C rpl_root.c inits trickle but never calls start(). Leads to different behavior for same RFC 6206 algorithm. Python uses _generation for async resets. See lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c:125, rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs:181, python/src/lichen/rpl/trickle.py:95, lichen/apps/gateway/src/rpl_root.c:27. Reviewed commits b722c4233,8ce765f9d,a8face218,f29f0c9c2 and related trickle ports.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-22T23:25:23.274107561Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:25:23.274107561Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-3rfh","title":"[cross-impl] TrickleTimer reset/start behavior differs across Rust/C/Python","description":"Rust treats Stopped state specially in reset() and starts the timer (see test reset_from_stopped_starts_timer and try_reset logic using state==Stopped). C and Python only check interval != imin (no-op after init since interval=imin). C rpl_root.c inits trickle but never calls start(). Leads to different behavior for same RFC 6206 algorithm. Python uses _generation for async resets. See lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c:125, rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs:181, python/src/lichen/rpl/trickle.py:95, lichen/apps/gateway/src/rpl_root.c:27. Reviewed commits b722c4233,8ce765f9d,a8face218,f29f0c9c2 and related trickle ports.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-22T23:25:23.274107561Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:41:00.048299188Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:41:00.048299188Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:46:00.048299188Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:41:00.048299188Z"}

new_value: Cross-impl consistency fixed: reset now starts timer from stopped state in C/Python/gateway to match Rust per RFC 6206. Tests pass. Commit a850840
